narrative:
Washington Township (precinct in Licking County) has 688 registered voters, with 45.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 43.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 11.2%, a pronounced Republican lean of 32.1 percentage points.
